arts.ttl: Liverpool Want to Sign 'Exceptional' Chelsea Star
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly targeting Chelsea defender Malo Gusto as a potential replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Southampton Star Feels ‘Disrespected’ After Behind The Scenes Talks
arts.sum: Tyler Dibling has impressed at Southampton but his stay at St. Mary's may not last too much longer

arts.ttl: Liverpool superstar wants to join Barcelona next summer
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Luis Diaz is determined to move to Barcelona next year, according to Spanish and Colombian media. The 27-year-old has reportedly been locked in contract talks with Liverpool for some time, but so far, there has been no breakthrough in negotiations.

arts.ttl: 'Huge lift': Pat Nevin shares why Andy Robertson red card could actually be great news for Liverpool
Liverpool wonderkid, 17, 'to make full debut in EFL Cup clash against Southampton' - as Arne Slot vows to 'keep developing' talented midfielder
arts.sum: As they race into the busy Christmas period, Slot will be aware that he will have to shuffle the pack to keep his stars fit, particularly in competitions such as the EFL Cup.

arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Andy Robertson Miss for Liverpool?
arts.sum: Andy Robertson will miss one game for Liverpool as he serves his suspension for receiving a straight red card.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane names Premier League player as best in the world after overlooking Liverpool No.11 Mohamed Salah
Liverpool discard option of using midfielder in deal to sign Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Aurelien Tchouameni has not had the easiest start to the season with Real Madrid, with his form having been called into question by fans and media alike. Despite this, he remains an integral part of Carlo Ancelotti’s squad, although that has not stopped speculation on his future from gaining traction. arts.ttl: Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk shows true colours with verdict on two Man City players
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk's selections for the FIFA The Best Men's player have been released, with the Liverpool defender choosing two Manchester City players
